behaviors.description: `=SUM(A1:A10)` evaluates to the correct sum of A1..A10.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: this failure is at a module boundary (range reference resolution + evaluator + SUM implementation), not just SUM arithmetic. ADJACENT-COUNTEREXAMPLE (vs Unit): a unit test of `sum([..])` passes, but the engine mis-parses `A1:A10` as `A1:A9`, so behavior fails. REAL-INFRA/LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: no OS/network/subprocess, no AI output, no multi-agent pipeline. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because behavior text only requires in-process workbook/evaluator wiring; no real OS primitive is required.
behaviors.test_description: Create an in-process workbook with numeric values in A1..A10, evaluate `=SUM(A1:A10)` through the real parser+reference resolver+function registry path, and assert the computed value matches the arithmetic total.

behaviors.description: A formula referencing a formula cell (e.g., `=B1+1`, `B1:=A1*2`) yields the correct cascaded result.

ADJACENT-COUNTEREXAMPLE (vs Unit): unit tests for expression evaluation of `A1*2` and `x+1` pass, but dependency graph fails to propagate B1 before evaluating the dependent cell, producing stale output. REAL-INFRA/LLM-DEP/MULTI-STEP: none apply. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System since no real OS/network/subprocess is needed by behavior text.
behaviors.test_description: Set A1 value, B1 formula `=A1*2`, C1 formula `=B1+1`; evaluate C1 via full engine pipeline and assert cascaded result.

behaviors.description: Circular dependency (A1->B1->A1) is detected and returns a circular reference error.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: detection depends on interaction of reference graph construction and evaluator traversal state. ADJACENT-COUNTEREXAMPLE (vs Unit): a unit test for DFS cycle detector passes on a synthetic graph, but parser/reference-linking omits one edge so runtime evaluator loops or misses the cycle. behaviors.test_description: Create formulas `A1:=B1+1` and `B1:=A1+1`, run evaluation through normal engine entrypoint, assert explicit circular-reference error and no unbounded loop.

behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: behavior spans serializer/deserializer + workbook model consistency; this is cross-module. ADJACENT-COUNTEREXAMPLE (vs Unit): unit tests for encoding/decoding primitives pass, but field ordering/version tag mismatch between save and load corrupts formulas on round-trip. INTEGRATION-BRAKE: (a) real OS/network/subprocess not strictly required for the target failure; local filesystem/in-memory round-trip can expose it, so not System. (b) no AI/ML output dependency. (c) no multi-agent steps. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System because behavior text targets data fidelity in format round-trip, not OS-specific filesystem behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Round-trip a workbook containing formulas and floating-point values through save/load (same process, local file path or equivalent stream used by persistence modules) and assert exact formula text plus numeric equality within strict precision tolerance.
